# rclone genmanpages

Output man pages for rclone to the directory supplied.

## Synopsis

This produces man page files for all rclone commands to the directory
supplied. The pages use the standard naming convention (rclone-copy.1,
rclone-sync.1, etc.) similar to git's man page layout.

```
rclone genmanpages output_directory [flags]
```

## Options

```
  -h, --help   help for genmanpages
```

See the [global flags page](/flags/) for global options not listed here.
